scripts.build: tsc && vite build && mkdir -p dist/cesium && cp -r node_modules/cesium/Build/Cesium/Workers dist/cesium/Workers && cp -r node_modules/cesium/Build/Cesium/Assets dist/cesium/Assets && cp -r node_modules/cesium/Build/Cesium/ThirdParty dist/cesium/ThirdParty && cp -r node_modules/cesium/Build/Cesium/Widgets dist/cesium/Widgets
